description: You are a data analyst investigating survival patterns from the Titanic disaster using the TitanicSurvival.csv dataset in jamovi. The dataset contains records for approximately 1,309 passengers with variables: 'survived' (yes/no), 'sex' (female/male), 'age' (years), and 'passengerClass' (1st/2nd/3rd). Examine whether survival was associated with passenger class and sex by performing chi-square tests of independence for 'survived' by 'passengerClass' and 'survived' by 'sex'. Include expected counts and row percentages in the contingency tables for both analyses. Save the completed analysis to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicAnalysis.omv.
